title: Cuneiform Tablet #0053: Middle Assyrian Marriage Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Assyrian period. Marriage Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records marriage contract matters typical of Middle Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
